Heavy Easter Eqq.name: Heavy Easter Eqq
Heavy Easter Eqq.description: Smash out an easter egg, dealing Damage equal to 100%+50% of Max HP ATK to enemies within 250 range, and Increase DMG by 100% against elite enemies.

Carnivore.name: Carnivore
Carnivore.description: Gain 50% damage reduction, 50% maximum HP increase, and 75% attack lifesteal effect.
